name: 01 - Overview
description: Top-level Gateway health: requests, latency, error rate, and provider mix sampled over the last 24h.

native.query: SELECT toDate(timestamp) AS day, count() AS requests FROM gateway_traces WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 14 DAY GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
SELECT toDate(timestamp) AS day, round(sum(cost_usd), 4) AS spend FROM gateway_traces WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 14 DAY GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
SELECT gen_ai_provider_name AS provider, countIf(status_code >= 500) / count() AS error_rate FROM gateway_traces WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY provider ORDER BY error_rate DESC
